name: P31 economical + powerful AI subscription stack
principles: Keep the trio: Opus (architect) + Gemini (narrator) + Composer 2 (mechanic).
Use flat-rate subs for interactive work; use pay-per-token API only for automation/agents.
Kill redundancies (Copilot vs Cursor, extra seats, nostalgia tools) before adding routing complexity.

subscriptions.role: Architect lane (deep QA, architecture, risk review); overflow mechanic.
Mechanic lane (WCD execution, multi-file edits, refactors).
Narrator lane (grants, research synthesis, long-context ingestion).

apiBudgets.purpose: SIMPLEX v7 agent crew (Workers) + batch jobs
notes: Separate from Claude Pro chat subscription.
Used for tool-style, shorter calls; keep monthly burn small and intentional.
Opus handles the 1% that prevents expensive mistakes.
Gemini handles narrative + doc ingestion at scale.

workspace.problem: Empty or over-tiered Workspace seats inflate cost.
workspace.note: Update these numbers when Google pricing changes; the invariant is seat hygiene + tier fit.

cancellationsToConfirm.reason: Nostalgia tool; cancel unless actively used for a current deliverable.
Optional entertainment; downgrade to Core or cancel.
Unused seats are pure waste; remove immediately.

trigger: Anthropic API burn >= $30/mo for 2 consecutive months
Need cheap models for non-critical agents (triage/health checks)
Offline-first requirement for Node One / low-connectivity operations
oracleRoutingLayer.defaultDecision: Do not build local routing (LiteLLM/OpenRouter) until triggers are met.
